[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1111111111 a
1 0110111011 7
2 0010011101 5
3 0000010101 3
4 1110000111 6
5 0101010110 5
6 1001010101 5
7 1101110110 7

01 10 1111010111 8

23 32 1101110111 8
34 43 1111111111 a match 0
45 54 1111111111 a match 0
56 65 0110111011 7 match 1
67 76 0010011101 5 match 2
70 07 1110010111 7

02 20 1111010111 8
13 31 1101110110 7 match 7
24 42 1111111101 9
35 53 1101110111 8
46 64 1111111101 9
57 75 0100110111 6

71 17 0101010111 6

47 74 1111111101 9
